title: Supply Chain Manager - Shiprocket - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Shiprocket - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Shiprocket. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Supply Chain Manager to strengthen our Varanasi-based team.

About Shiprocket:
Shiprocket is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shiprocket!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
